---
title: "SPY Core"
---

<a href="../index.qmd" class="back-link">← Dog Capital</a>

Monthly vol-targeting accumulation into SPY CEDEARs via Balanz. No leverage.
Designed for Argentine investors building USD-denominated savings systematically.

---

## How it works

Each month, the strategy computes the realized downside volatility of SPY over
the prior 21 trading days. It then sizes the monthly buy to bring total exposure
toward a 20% annualized downside volatility target.

When markets are calm, the full monthly allocation is deployed. When realized
volatility exceeds the target, the strategy scales back — or holds — and parks
idle capital in a dólar-linked money market fund (Balanz Fondo Dólar Linked).
No selling unless a sustained volatility breach triggers a REDUCE alert.

**Signal logic:**

- Instrument: SPY (CEDEAR, 10:1 ratio, Balanz)
- Volatility measure: downside semi-deviation of daily returns
- Lookback: 21 trading days
- Vol target: 20% annualized
- Leverage: none — strategy can only de-risk, never lever up
- Smoothing: EMA(10) + 10% no-trade band to reduce unnecessary turnover
- Cadence: monthly execution, first trading day of the month
- Idle capital: Balanz Fondo Dólar Linked

---

## Backtest results

> **Hypothetical backtested results.** Not achieved by any investor.
> Past hypothetical performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.

| Metric | SPY Buy & Hold | SPY Core |
|--------|:--------------:|:--------:|
| CAGR | 9.86% | 9.45% |
| Sharpe | 0.589 | 0.693 |
| Max Drawdown | -55.19% | -36.97% |
| Period | 2001–2026 | 2001–2026 |

The strategy gives up a small amount of raw return in exchange for meaningfully
better risk-adjusted performance and a 18 percentage point shallower max drawdown.
For a long-term accumulation program, the drawdown reduction matters more than
the CAGR gap.

*Backtest on USD underlying (SPY), $10,000 lump sum, no contributions.*

---

## Equity curve

![Equity Curve](spy-core/equity_curves.png)

---

## Drawdown

![Drawdown](spy-core/drawdown.png)

---

## DCA scenario — $200/month

Starting with $10,000 and adding $200 every month. Same capital deployed to both.

![Strategy vs SPY B&H + $200/month](spy-core/dca_overlay.png)

*Grey dashed: SPY Buy & Hold + $200/month. Blue: SPY Core + $200/month.*

---

## Live deployment

Running live on Balanz since June 2026. Monthly signals sent via Telegram.
Live performance will be published here as it accumulates.

---

## Why CEDEARs

CEDEARs (Certificados de Depósito Argentinos) are Argentine depositary receipts
that track USD-denominated underlying assets like SPY. They trade on BYMA in
pesos but are priced at the MEP dollar rate, giving Argentine investors effective
USD exposure without needing to move money offshore.

SPY Core operates entirely on local infrastructure — no foreign account, no
capital transfer, no AFIP complications. You buy CEDEARs on Balanz, the system
tells you how many, you execute.

---

*&copy; 2026 Dog Capital*
